name: Legs Company, Ltd.
summary: Legs Company, Ltd. provides marketing solutions that connects companies, places, and consumers in Japan. The company provides various IP selection, license agreements with copyright holders, cafe interior, original menus, special goods, and store operations. It also offers services that connects IP content and marketing for companies; and selects and builds supply chains. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
